childhood.familyBackground: Born July 29, 1937. Discovered at age 40 to be dyslexic; one of his sons is also dyslexic.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 1937년 7월 29일 출생. 40세에 난독증이 있음을 발견; 아들 중 하나도 난독증이 있음.
childhood.education: Stanford University (mathematics and economics emphasis, with help from friends taking notes)
childhood.educationKo: 스탠포드 대학교(수학 및 경제학 강조, 친구들의 필기 도움)
childhood.earlyLife: Overcame dyslexia through determination and support. Developed interest in investing and democratizing access to markets.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 결단력과 지원으로 난독증 극복. 투자에 대한 관심 개발 및 시장 접근 민주화.

careerTimeline.event: Launched Investment Indicator investment newsletter with three partners
careerTimeline.eventKo: 세 명의 파트너와 함께 Investment Indicator 투자 뉴스레터 출범

careerTimeline.event: Incorporated First Commander Corporation, later became Charles Schwab & Co.
careerTimeline.eventKo: First Commander Corporation 설립, 이후 Charles Schwab & Co.가 됨

careerTimeline.event: Pioneered discount brokerage model after SEC deregulation of securities industry
careerTimeline.eventKo: 증권업 SEC 규제 완화 후 할인 중개 모델 개척

careerTimeline.event: Established online trading and 24/7 service access for individual investors
careerTimeline.eventKo: 개인 투자자를 위한 온라인 거래 및 24/7 서비스 접근 제공

careerTimeline.event: Stepped down as CEO while remaining as Chairman

quotes.text: We have a duty to make investing easier and more accessible for everyone.
quotes.textKo: 우리는 모두를 위해 투자를 더 쉽고 접근성 있게 만들 의무가 있습니다.
quotes.context: On Schwab's mission to democratize investing
quotes.contextKo: 투자 민주화에 대한 슈왑의 미션 관련

authored.title: Invested: Change Your Mind, Change Your Life
authored.why: Personal finance and investing philosophy guide for everyday investors
authored.whyKo: 일반 투자자를 위한 개인 재정 및 투자 철학 가이드

personalTraits.knownFor: Democratizing investing, pioneering discount brokerage, overcoming dyslexia, 24/7 trading access
personalTraits.knownForKo: 투자 민주화, 할인 중개 개척, 난독증 극복, 24/7 거래 접근
personalTraits.philanthropy: Charles and Helen Schwab Foundation - learning disabilities research including dyslexia
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 찰스 헬렌 슈왑 재단 - 난독증을 포함한 학습 장애 연구
